channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal Box
item.description: Choose a McDouble or McChicken with 4-pc Nuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Pick a Double Cheeseburger, Bacon Double Cheeseburger, or Crispy Chicken Jr. with nuggets, fries, and a drink for $5 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: $5 Biggie Bag
item.description: Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT plus nuggets, junior fries, and a small drink for $5 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips with nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza — Any Toppings
item.description: Any pizza with up to 7 toppings (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) for $9.99 via online or app order. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $7.99 Carryout Special
item.description: Any 1-topping carryout pizza (excl. XL) or 8-pc wings or boneless chicken for $7.99 via online order. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: Buy One Get One Free Sandwich
item.guid: Arby's-Buy One Get One Free Sandwich-2026-07-12
item.description: Use the Arby's app this week to get a second sandwich of your choice free when you buy one. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $6 Big Box — Chicken + 2 Sides + Biscuit
item.guid: Popeyes-$6 Big Box — Chicken + 2 Sides + Biscuit-2026-07-12
item.description: Two pieces of signature chicken or 3 tenders, two regular sides, and a buttermilk biscuit for just $6 at participating locations. (Through July 13, 2026)

item.title: Del Taco: Free Regular Fries with $3+ Purchase
item.guid: Del Taco-Free Regular Fries with $3+ Purchase-2026-07-12
item.description: Get a free regular order of fries with any $3 minimum purchase in the Del Yeah! Rewards app — National French Fry Day celebration. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: Buy One Sandwich or Salad, Get One for $5
item.guid: Panera Bread-Buy One Sandwich or Salad, Get One for $-2026-07-12
item.description: Purchase any whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, or bowl of soup and get a second one for just $5 — a ~50% savings on your second item. (Limited time)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Half Portions
item.description: Choose up to 10 half-portion menu items — soups, sandwiches, or salads — each for $4.99, saving ~40% off regular prices. (Ongoing)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: 20% Off Entire Order — Code FIREUP20
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-20% Off Entire Order — Code FIREUP20-2026-07-12
item.description: Apply promo code FIREUP20 at checkout online or in-app for 20% off your order of fire-grilled chicken bowls, salads, burritos, and more. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Jamba: World Cup Hat Trick Tango Smoothie + 50% Off
item.guid: Jamba-World Cup Hat Trick Tango Smoothie + 50%-2026-07-12
item.description: Limited-time FIFA World Cup 2026 Hat Trick Tango smoothie available now, with a 50% off promotional deal in the Jamba app. (Limited time)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: 'How Far You'll Mango' Disney Moana Smoothie
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-'How Far You'll Mango' Disne-2026-07-12
item.description: Limited-time Disney Moana collaboration smoothie available now at Tropical Smoothie Cafe — order ahead in the Tropic Rewards app. (Limited time)

item.title: Sonic: America $2.50 Menu — Jr. Double Cheeseburger, Hot Dog & More
item.description: The Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, medium Onion Rings, and Red White & Blue Slush Float are each just $2.50. (Through July 12, 2026)
